title: Failure to set workdir with overlayfs volumes
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->

Podman seems to have a problem setting the workdir (via the `-w` flag) in the container when using an overlay volume on kernels that support rootless overlays through overlayfs. I Tried forcing the use of fuse-overlayfs and it didn't result in such issue.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. Run the command `podman run -it --rm --volume /var:/var_ovl/:O -w /var_ovl/log docker.io/library/bash bash` on a 5.11+ kernel using the overlayfs driver.


**Describe the results you received:**

```
Error: workdir "/var_ovl/log" does not exist on container
```

**Describe the results you expected:**
Being able to set the work dir to mountpoints inside the overlay volume.

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
\Client:       Podman Engine
Version:      4.2.1
API Version:  4.2.1
Go Version:   go1.19
Git Commit:   62b324ddf718411b1d4d0ba8117c632f7f984a38-dirty
Built:        Thu Sep  8 08:52:54 2022
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```
